tagline: Advanced Scalp Treatments Backed by Clinical Expertise

hero.headline:
Your Scalp Deserves Clinical
Expertise
hero.subheadline: Japanese head spa methods meet modern scalp science. Our licensed estheticians treat the root cause of scalp concerns so your hair can finally thrive. Walk in stressed, walk out transformed.

services.label: Our Treatments
services.headline: Scalp Wellness That Goes<br class="hidden md:block"> Beyond the Surface
services.subtitle: Every treatment is rooted in clinical scalp science and performed by licensed professionals. We treat your scalp as an extension of your skin.

cards.title: Signature HeadSpa
cards.description: Deep cleansing, exfoliation, and Halo Water Therapy to restore scalp balance, remove buildup, and support long-term hair health through clinical-grade care.

cards.title: HeadSpa Luxe + Facial
cards.description: Our signature head spa combined with a clinical facial, treating scalp and skin as one connected system for total rejuvenation from crown to chin.

cards.title: LED & Jelly Mask Luxe
cards.description: The most advanced experience featuring light therapy technology and a customized jelly mask for enhanced scalp healing and deep skin restoration.

cards.title: Glass Skin Facial
cards.description: A clinical facial focused on achieving luminous, glass-like skin through deep hydration, exfoliation, and targeted skincare techniques.

cards.title: HeadSpa Locs Detox
cards.description: A specialized scalp detox designed specifically for clients with locs, providing deep cleansing and scalp stimulation without disturbing loc integrity.

cards.title: Brazilian Lymphatic Drainage
cards.description: Brazilian lymphatic drainage massage paired with the signature head spa for full-body detoxification and deep scalp wellness in one session.

steps.title: Book Your Consultation
steps.description: Choose your treatment and location. Our team will assess your scalp concerns and recommend the ideal service for your hair and skin goals.

steps.title: Experience Clinical Care
steps.description: Your licensed esthetician or cosmetologist performs your personalized treatment using Japanese head spa techniques, lymphatic methods, and clinical-grade products.

steps.title: See the Transformation
steps.description: Leave with a healthier scalp, visibly revitalized hair, and a level of relaxation you did not know was possible. Most clients rebook before they leave.

about.label: Why Clients Trust Us
about.headline: Clinical Scalp Science Meets Japanese Tradition
about.description: Founded by Emily Condle, a clinical esthetician with 16+ years in medical aesthetics, and Desarai Mannelly, a master cosmetologist, The Sage HeadSpa was built on a simple belief: your scalp is skin, and it deserves the same clinical attention as your face. With over 50,000 clients served across 10 locations in 6 states, we have grown from a single Georgia studio into a nationwide brand trusted by thousands.

features.title: Licensed Professionals Only
features.description: Every treatment is performed by a licensed esthetician or cosmetologist trained in our proprietary scalp wellness protocols.

features.title: Science-Backed Methods
features.description: We combine Japanese head spa traditions with lymphatic drainage, circulation-focused techniques, and clinical skincare science.

features.title: Personalized Every Visit
features.description: No two scalps are the same. Every session begins with an assessment so your treatment targets your specific concerns and goals.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Premium Results.
pricing.subtitle: Every treatment is customized to your needs. Book a consultation to find the perfect service for your scalp and skin goals.

guarantee.headline: Our "Total Relaxation" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you do not leave feeling completely renewed after your treatment, let us know before you walk out. We will adjust your service until you feel the difference. Your comfort and results are our only priority.

faqs.question: What should I expect during my first HeadSpa?
faqs.answer: Your first visit begins with a scalp consultation where we assess your scalp health and concerns. Then you will experience deep cleansing, exfoliation, and our signature Halo Water Therapy. Most clients say they nearly fall asleep from the relaxation. The full treatment takes 60-90 minutes depending on the service.

faqs.question: Do I need to wash my hair before my appointment?
faqs.answer: No, come as you are. In fact, arriving with your natural scalp state helps our licensed professionals better assess your scalp condition and customize your treatment for the best results.

faqs.question: Is a head spa good for hair growth?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our treatments promote circulation, remove buildup that can block follicles, and create a healthier scalp environment. A healthy scalp is the foundation for stronger, fuller hair growth over time.

faqs.question: Can I get a HeadSpa if I have locs or protective styles?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a specialized HeadSpa Locs Detox designed specifically for clients with locs and protective styles. We provide deep cleansing and scalp stimulation without disturbing your loc integrity.

faqs.question: Which location should I visit?
faqs.answer: We have 10 studio locations across 6 states including Alpharetta GA, Brentwood TN, Charlotte NC, Delray Beach FL, Jacksonville FL, Naperville IL, Palm Beach Gardens FL, Southlake TX, Tampa FL, and Winter Park FL. Book at whichever location is most convenient for you.

testimonials.name: Alexis W.
testimonials.text: I almost fell asleep multiple times because of how relaxed I was. The facial and head spa treatment was absolutely incredible. My scalp felt brand new and my skin was glowing for days.

testimonials.name: Kelly B.
testimonials.text: The water halo treatment experience was pure euphoria. Incredibly relaxing and unlike anything I have ever experienced before. I have already booked my next appointment.

testimonials.name: Julia G.
testimonials.text: I actually felt like an angel after the lymphatic face massage and halo treatment. Wonderfully relaxing and my skin looked sculpted and lifted. Already told all my friends.
